response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and clear leadership progression through multiple Staff engineer roles, they fall critically short of the minimum requirements. The role requires 8 years of C++ programming; the resume shows only 6 months of documented C++ experience at National Instruments plus minimal additional work, totaling less than 2 years. Additionally, the candidate's background is primarily web services, data platforms, and application development rather than the specialized domain of large-scale cloud compute infrastructure and systems architecture required for leading an internal cloud platform.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership across multiple Staff engineer roles with clear mentoring contributions through Refactoring Dojos, course creation, and open-source projects
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with emphasis on testing, TDD, and engineering best practices applied across diverse technology stacks
Proven ability to architect and own complex projects end-to-end, from GISCollective platform design to distributed data systems at Dunnhumby
concerns: Severely lacks minimum C++ experience requirement—resume documents less than 2 years total versus 8-year minimum, with no recent work in the language
Background is primarily application-layer and web services development, not the systems-level infrastructure and compute architecture required for cloud platform leadership
No evidence of specialized experience in distributed compute systems, cloud platform architecture, or hardware and storage technologies core to the role

key_factors.factor: Domain Mismatch (Web/Backend vs. Cloud Compute Systems)
